desc: Fix 6 pipeline hardening issues: compile_hash validation, orient branch info, make commit failure reporting, validator env vars, agent attribution safety, completed.json schema

init.desc: Synthetic init — roots all independent tasks

compile-hash-gate.desc: make should validate compile_hash format before writing spec-origin.json. If compile_hash is not a 64-char hex string, hash it with sha256. This prevents the trap where make accepts bad input but pre-commit rejects the commit later.

validate.statement: Plan clarity: make normalizes compile_hash to sha256 hex — non-hex strings get hashed, pre-commit never rejects valid make output

orient-branch-info.desc: Add 'branch' field to orient output — current git branch name. Agents can verify they're on the expected branch before committing. Also add 'worktree' boolean (true if in a git worktree).

validate.statement: Plan clarity: orient output includes branch name and worktree flag — agents can assert branch before committing

make-commit-failure.desc: make silently catches commit failures (line ~811 catch(e){}). Instead: if commit fails, include a warning in the output JSON { commitFailed: true, reason: string }. Don't throw — head.json is already written — but surface the failure so agents know git state is dirty.

validate.statement: Plan clarity: make reports commit failure as warning in output — never silently swallows

validator-env-vars.desc: Shell validators in advance should receive env vars: ROADMAP_BRANCH (current branch), ROADMAP_NODE (node being validated), ROADMAP_REPO (repo root). This lets validator commands adapt to runtime context instead of being fully static.

validate.statement: Plan clarity: shell validators get ROADMAP_BRANCH, ROADMAP_NODE, ROADMAP_REPO env vars — commands can branch on runtime state

completed-json-schema.desc: Validate completed.json entries on write in saveCompletionWithEvidence. Every entry must have { nodeId: string, completedAt: string, evidence: Array<{ rule: string, passed: boolean, evidence: string }> }. Reject malformed entries. Migrate legacy entries on read.

validate.statement: Plan clarity: completed.json has enforced schema — write rejects malformed, read migrates legacy entries

agent-attribution-warn.desc: When advanceNode detects that the branch has uncommitted changes not by the current process (check git status for untracked/modified files outside the node's produces), emit a warning in advance output: { attribution_warning: 'Branch has changes outside this node produces' }. Non-blocking but visible.

validate.statement: Plan clarity: advance warns when branch has changes outside node produces — attribution safety net

hardening-verified.desc: Integration: all 6 hardening fixes verified end-to-end. make normalizes hashes, orient shows branch, commit failures surface, validators get env, completed.json has schema, attribution warnings fire.

validate.statement: All 6 hardening issues resolved — make→orient→advance pipeline has no silent failures and agents have full runtime context
